rulings.Case Title: ROBERT SCHINDLER ET AL VS. HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Dismiss
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 14, 2017 in Department 503, Line 1. Specially appearing defendant Dravo Basic Materials Company, Inc.'s motion to quash service of summons and dismiss is off calendar at the moving party's request. = (503/CML)
